title: Bridge Essay: Revisiting Bruner's Legacy from the Perspective of Historical Materialism.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Revisiting, Bruner's, Legacy, from, the.

**Revisiting Bruner's Legacy from the Perspective of Historical Materialism.** — Integr Psychol Behav Sci. PMID: 31041587. DOI: 10.1007/s12124-019-09490-7. The book Jerome S. Bruner beyond 100: cultivating possibilities is acelebration and acontinuing development of Jerome S. Bruner'scontribution in psychology. As areview of this book, this article aims to commemorate Bruner'slegacy by developing it further. The main content of the book is summarized into four issues: culture and language, narrative and folk psychology, dilemmas and shared dilemmas, subjectivity and intersubjectivity.
